dealDetail.youAreCommitted: You Are Committed to This Deal
dealDetail.contactToDiscuss: Contact us to discuss commitment terms
dealDetail.dealAssignedDesc: This deal has been successfully assigned to an investor.
dealDetail.contactWithin24: Our team will contact you with next steps within 24 hours.
dealDetail.withdrawConfirmTitle: Are you sure you want to withdraw?
dealDetail.withdrawConfirmDesc: Your position will no longer be reserved and may be taken by another investor.
dealDetail.groupsAlreadyCommitted: {count} group{count, plural, one {} other {s}} already committed to this deal
dealDetail.positionsLimited: Positions are limited. Commit now to secure your allocation.
dealDetail.contactForWiring: Contact our team for full wiring details
dealDetail.backupDescription: If the primary buyer's wire expires, backup buyers are notified immediately.
dealDetail.institutionalAnalysis: Institutional analysis by RePrime research team
dealDetail.betaDisclaimer: Beta: Returns shown reflect property-level economics. Closing costs, disposition fees, and sponsor economics are not included in this projection. Final offering terms may include additional costs.
dealDetail.zeroEquityCallout: This deal is fully financed by senior and seller debt — the investor writes no check and receives this cash flow annually.
dealDetail.confirmationEmail: You will receive a confirmation email shortly with meeting details.
dealDetail.noSlotsAvailable: No available slots on this day
dealDetail.typicalResponseTime: Typical response time: within 2 business hours
dealDetail.confidentialAccess: This material is for authorized Terminal members only. All investments involve risk.
dealDetail.howWeSourceDeals: How we source deals at deeper discounts
dealDetail.howWeSourceP1: Every deal on this platform goes through the same institutional diligence — regardless of deposit terms. The analysis, the inspections, the title work, the environmental review — nothing changes. We complete diligence BEFORE the deposit goes hard, not after.
dealDetail.howWeSourceP2: The difference is speed and certainty. When we approach a seller with a non-refundable deposit, they accept a lower price because the risk of deal collapse disappears. Same diligence. Same protections. Lower price.
dealDetail.howWeSourceP3: Members who pre-commit deposit capital enable us to secure more of these opportunities. In return, they receive fixed 3% economics on every transaction. Positions are limited.
dealDetail.footerConfidential: This material is confidential and intended solely for the use of authorized Terminal members. Any reproduction or distribution is strictly prohibited. All investments involve risk.
dealDetail.expressInterestDesc: The RePrime team will contact you within 24 hours to discuss this opportunity.
dealDetail.viewOnlyWatermarked: View Only · Watermarked · All activity logged
dealDetail.dealViewedByMember: Deal viewed by a Terminal member
dealDetail.feeBreakdownIncluded: Fee breakdown included in projected returns
dealDetail.allFeesIncluded: All fees included in projected IRR
dealDetail.assignmentDesc: Clean assignment of contract with fixed fee. All projected returns account for the assignment fee.
dealDetail.assignmentStructureDesc: You receive a clean assignment of the purchase contract. REPRIME assigns all rights and obligations to you for a fixed fee. All projected returns shown account for the assignment fee.
dealDetail.gplpStructureDesc: REPRIME serves as General Partner. You invest as Limited Partner. Distributions are paid after the preferred return hurdle. REPRIME receives carry of profits above the preferred return.

dataRoom.requestDescription: Request from our team and we'll source it from the seller.

financial.fullyFinanced: Fully Financed — No Investor Equity Required

nda.title: Non-Disclosure Agreement
nda.requiredBefore: Required before accessing confidential deal materials
nda.agreeText: I have read and agree to the terms of this Non-Disclosure Agreement
nda.mustAgreeTerms: You must agree to the NDA terms.
nda.ndaIntro: This Non-Disclosure Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into as of {date} by and between RePrime Group, LLC ("Disclosing Party") and the undersigned recipient ("Receiving Party").
nda.ndaConfidential: The Receiving Party agrees to hold in confidence all Confidential Information provided through the RePrime Terminal platform, including but not limited to: financial statements, rent rolls, operating data, purchase agreements, loan documents, environmental reports, property condition assessments, tenant information, and any related deal materials.
nda.ndaNoDisclose: The Receiving Party shall not disclose, publish, or otherwise reveal any Confidential Information to any third party without prior written consent. The Receiving Party acknowledges that all documents accessed through the platform are watermarked and tracked.
nda.ndaDuration: This Agreement shall remain in effect for a period of two (2) years from the date of execution. Breach of this Agreement may result in immediate termination of platform access and legal action.
nda.blanketNdaDesc: Covers all current and future deals on the platform. Sign once.
nda.dealSpecificDesc: Covers this deal only. You'll be prompted for each new deal.

onboarding.accessDescription: You now have access to institutional-grade commercial real estate opportunities.

onboarding.marketSidebarDescription: CRE cycle positioning, maturity wall data, and recent platform activity at a glance.
onboarding.notifBellDescription: Deal updates, new documents, and deadline reminders appear here.

join.foundingMemberDesc: All founding members receive our highest membership level, valued at $100,000 annually. No membership fees apply during the founding period.
join.reviewWithin48: Our team will review your application within 48 hours.
join.foundingByInvitation: Founding membership is by invitation only. Applications reviewed within 48 hours.

join.enterCodeBelow: Enter your code below to activate your membership.
